_description: Golden test cases for end-to-end integration testing. Each case defines an input and fuzzy assertions about what the system should find. These tests run against a live deployment and validate result quality.
_usage: python3.13 -m pytest tests/test_golden_set.py -v  (credentials auto-discovered from firebase-config.json)

_assertion_schema.expect_phone_found: (bool) At least one phone in enrichment.contacts.phones
_assertion_schema.expect_email_found: (bool) At least one discovered email in enrichment.contacts.emails
_assertion_schema.expect_address_found: (bool) At least one address in enrichment.contacts.addresses
_assertion_schema.expect_breaches_found: (bool) At least one breach in identity.breaches
_assertion_schema.expect_company_domain_resolved: (bool) At least one domain with whois or mx data
_assertion_schema.expect_social_profiles: (list[str]) Platform names expected in identity.scored.top_handles (e.g. linkedin, facebook, instagram)
_assertion_schema.report_should_contain: (list[str]) Terms that must appear in the structured result JSON (case-insensitive)
_assertion_schema.markdown_should_contain: (list[str]) Terms that must appear in the generated markdown report (case-insensitive)

cases.description: Interior designer in Toronto, strong public footprint, active social media, company director
CanCap employee, younger person with social media, McGill grad, corporate email discoverable
ARAMARK labour relations director, painter, large company, no breaches expected
